purpose: Machine-readable index for the historical CubiCasa-derived CadStruct MoE assets. This separates reusable canonical experts from later raster-only experiments.

project_goal_boundary.historical_baseline: CubiCasa/SVG-derived structured expert training and typed-candidate MoE fusion.
project_goal_boundary.current_product_goal: Non-SVG raster-only drawing recognition. It may reuse historical experts only after raster candidates are converted into the same expert-facing contracts.
do_not_conflate: Historical expert metrics are candidate/contract-level metrics.
Recent raster-only low precision mainly measures upstream candidate/relation reconstruction, not the intrinsic quality of the historical experts.

graph_node_lie_topology_raster_v3.role: Graph-node crop/GNN expert dataset with topology, Lie/SE(2), and raster crop features

boundary.responsibility: Classify/refine wall, opening/door, and window candidates after candidate generation.
boundary.contract_boundary: Requires structural/candidate-level boundary inputs; does not by itself solve raw raster full-page candidate generation.

graph_node_crop_gnn.responsibility: Map primitive/crop graph nodes to hard_wall, door, and window labels with local visual and message-passing evidence.
graph_node_crop_gnn.contract_boundary: Requires node/crop/proposal records. It is not a detector from a blank full-page raster.

room_space.responsibility: Classify room/space candidates and support room-aware scene graph fusion.
room_space.contract_boundary: Candidate-level room classification; not a raw raster room-polygon detector.

symbol_fixture.responsibility: Classify fixture/symbol candidates and expose long-tail/open-set confusion.
symbol_fixture.contract_boundary: Reusable for candidate-level symbol classification, but current raster-only product still needs a true symbol body/type detector.

text_dimension.responsibility: Classify and link dimension/note text candidates after text localization/OCR.
text_dimension.contract_boundary: Layout-aware text/dimension expert; not a raw OCR engine replacement.

direct_split_metric_boundary.use_for: Standalone expert quality and reusable asset decisions.
direct_split_metric_boundary.do_not_use_for: End-to-end raster-only product quality; use raster locked runners for that.

domain_structured_router.decision: Use deterministic typed-candidate routing as the main auditable MoE mechanism. Learned/top-k routing remains ablation or diagnostic.

public_raster_moe_supervision_v19.note: Useful for non-SVG/raster-only rebuild, but not evidence that historical experts failed.

boundary_public_raster_v19.note: CubiCasa-only structural boundary view for future tile-based detector/segmenter work.
